title: SRP-Info
description: this mod is made to be used in the playable-srp modpack
body:
**SRP-Info is a mod that adds information about the current SRP stages**

it has

* Phase level
* Percentage till next phase
* Ubiquitous Development [Starts showing @ level 1]
* Amount of Nodes [Starts showing @ level 4 Ubiquitous]

***Preview in gallery***
